name: Hernekeitto (Finnish Split-Pea Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dried yellow split peas or green split peas
2 cups Cubed fully cooked ham or 1 1/2 lb Smoked pork hocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the wholespice in cheesecloth and tie with string to form a spice bag.
2. In a large saucepan, combine water, peas, ham (or pork hocks), and allspice. Bring to boil. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
3. Add potatoes, carrots, onion, salt, and pepper. Return to boiling. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Remove spice bag. If using pork hocks, remove and cool slightly. When cool enough to handle, remove meat from bones and coarsely chop. Discard bones. Return meat to soup.
5. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
Note: Source: August 1992 issue of Midwest Living.
